positive: A minimalist, symmetrical abstract design featuring stylized interlocking natural elements—such as graceful crescent moons, symmetrical alpine flora, stylized waves, and soaring geometric birds—arranged within a central circular crest. The style should be neo-art nouveau meets abstract heraldry, rendered with clean, thick black silhouettes against a contrasting muted sage green or cream background. Use negative space dramatically. Composition must be suitable for apparel printing, ensuring high contrast, crisp edges, and scalable detail. Golden ratio proportions for overall layout. High detail, vector graphic quality, flat colors, ink screen print aesthetic, centered, symmetrical.
negative: blurry, artifact, text, watermark, signature, low detail, messy, grunge, poor anatomy, bad hands, out of focus, gradient, photographic, realistic
